title: [MTR4] NPC's Electric Bus Pack
description: Assorted electric buses for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
Electrify your Minecraft bus network with this collection of various electric buses, brought to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod featuring custom models and textures.

The following makes and models are included in the pack, with both LHT and RHT variants.
- Mercedes-Benz eCitaro
- MAN Lion's City 12E
- MCV C127 EV

Note: All vehicles do not have sounds.
